episode.title: MTG Fast Finance Ep 340: Dominaria United Early Winners
episode.description: James and Derek break down all the latest in fast moving card prices, the latest MTGO Modern and Pioneer results, Cards to Watch and talk over recent MTGO changes and the early winners from Dominaria United competitive play.
